audit.reason: All cases are clearly supported by the requirement, which specifies rejection of spaces and invalid characters like '<' and '>'.
All cases are clearly supported by the requirement, which specifies rejection of URLs starting with 'mailto:'.

audit.group_title: Enforce maximum URL length when `validate_length` is true
audit.reason: The invalid case 'http://example.com/' does not exceed the maximum length and contradicts the requirement. It has been removed.
